summary_en: Maruo Calcium tendered all 100,000 shares held in Maruo Un (TSE code 9067) to Senko Group Holdings public tender offer at ¥949/share (¥94.9M). Tender period 26 Jan – 5 Mar 2026; settlement 12 Mar 2026. Maruo Calcium recorded ¥75M gain on sale in Q4 FY3/26.
title_en: Notice Regarding Response to Public Tender Offer and Recording of Extraordinary Gain (Investment Securities Gain)
translation_en_brief: Maruo Calcium announced on 14 May 2026 that it tendered all 100,000 shares it held in Maruo Un Co., Ltd. (TSE code 9067) to a public tender offer launched by Senko Group Holdings. The tender price was ¥949 per ordinary share, totalling ¥94.9 million. The offer ran from 26 January to 5 March 2026, with settlement on 12 March 2026. Maruo Un's board of directors expressed support for the transaction. Maruo Calcium determined that the tender conditions contributed to its corporate value enhancement and elected to respond affirmatively. Following completion of the tender, the company recorded an extraordinary gain of ¥75 million as an investment securities gain in the fourth quarter of fiscal year ending March 2026.
